page.title: Concord Kung Fu Academy - Train Harder, Live Better ® - Training Programs

content.visible_text: Home Academy Classes Programs Schedule Contact Us News & Events Champion Program Maximize your training to achieve your personal best by receiving a weekly private lesson PLUS unlimited group classes and access to our video library of forms. Your private lesson will ensure that you reach and surpass your personal goals, as well as advance you to the next level at your own pace. Novice Program Receive two private lessons per month PLUS unlimited group classes. Your instructors will guide you through your training to make sure you stay on track. Recreational Program Improve your overall health and fitness through traditional martial arts training in a safe and supportive environment. Take as many group classes for your age and rank as your schedule allows. Trial Program “The teacher opens the door, but the student must step through. ~ Chinese proverb Curious about the type of training we have to offer? Not ready to make a commitment? After the introductory course, take our trial Champion Program for one month and experience what we have to offer. About Us "Train Harder, Live Better!"® We teach Choy Li Fut Kung Fu and Yang Tai Chi Chuan. Concord Kung Fu Academy 5442 Ygnacio Valley Road Suite 90 Concord, CA 94521 Phone: (925) 304-6688 Email: Contact Us Here Sitemap Academy Classes Programs Schedule Contact Us News & Events ©2026 Iron & Silk, Inc.
